highlights.headline: Miami Heat vs. Boston Celtics: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Miami Heat vs. Boston Celtics: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Miami Heat vs. Boston Celtics: Game Highlights) 2026/02/07 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Jaylen Brown had 29 points while Payton Pritchard scored 24 points to help the Boston Celtics make their biggest comeback of the season, rallying from a 22-point deficit to defeat the Miami Heat 98-96 on Friday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Celts rally from 22-point deficit to edge Heat, 98-96

events.name: New York Knicks at Detroit Pistons

highlights.description: New York Knicks vs. Detroit Pistons: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (New York Knicks vs. Detroit Pistons: Game Highlights) 2026/02/07 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Daniss Jenkins scored 18 points in his last game as a two-way player and the Detroit Pistons routed New York 118-80 on Friday night to end the Knicks' winning streak at eight games.
headlines.shortLinkText: 2-way player Daniss Jenkins scores 18 points as Pistons rout Knicks, 118-80

headlines.description: — Kevin Porter Jr. had 23 points, eight assists and seven rebounds and the Milwaukee Bucks beat the Indiana Pacers 105-99 on Friday night for their first three-game winning streak of the season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bucks beat Pacers 105-99 for first 3-game winning streak of season

headlines.description: — Saddiq Bay scored 30 points, including two free throws with 10.8 seconds remaining, helping the New Orleans Pelicans overcome an 18-point second-half deficit in a 119-115 win over the Minnesota Timberwolves on Friday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Pelicans erase 18-point second-half deficit in 119-115 win over Timberwolves

headlines.description: — Jerami Grant had 23 points and the Portland Trail Blazers snapped a six-game losing streak, beating the Memphis Grizzlies 135-115 on Friday night to open a two-game set.
headlines.shortLinkText: Grant scores 23 points to help Trail Blazers rout Grizzlies, 135-115

highlights.description: LA Clippers vs. Sacramento Kings: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (LA Clippers vs. Sacramento Kings: Game Highlights) 2026/02/07 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Kawhi Leonard scored 31 points, grabbed nine rebounds and had seven assists to lead the Los Angeles Clippers to a 114-111 victory over Sacramento on Friday night, sending the Kings to their 11th straight loss.
headlines.shortLinkText: Kawhi Leonard's 31 points lift Clippers over Kings, handing Sacramento 11th straight loss
